title: Bray's Zombie Overhaul x Fresh Animations
description: Bray's Zombie Overhaul pack with Fresh Animations compatibility!
body:
# Bray's Zombie Overhaul!

<center>

The zombie variants you love from [Bray's Zombie Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brays-zombie-overhaul), with Fresh Animation support!

![zombie + FA](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c6ca4a3712984cc454246a11423a2f28696dff4.png)

</center>

CREDIT: Thank you to FreshLX for their wonderful model animations. Please consider downloading [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) to show your support :)

<center>
  
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b716f9bf1f25106aea330ff2308302ce911dea3a.png)](https://discord.gg/H7JPX6hPQB)
[![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e66483ab22160e1621066e9df3c259615edd2ba9.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@BraysWorld_MC)

</center>
